steps.title: Use the performance example
steps.content: The example shows videos of people talking about their hair and audience members sharing pictures of their hairstyles. Those details show people actively taking part in Mercer's creative process.

steps.title: Choose active participation
steps.content: Choice A suggests anxiety, choice B suggests the creative process completes people, and choice C suggests people delay it. The phrase "involved in" means actively participating in, which matches the example. The answer is D.
